Remove the startup command for the Merchant Service from the orchestration script.
Remove the startup command for the Cart Service from the orchestration script.

Remove the status echo line for the Merchant Service.

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.18 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
services/api-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; running Spring Boot 3 on Java 11 or with old dependencies causes classpath and compilation errors.

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
services/api-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will fail to compile if source/target compatibility is set to 11 while using Java 21 features or if the runtime environment enforces JDK 21.

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.8 to 2023.0.3 to match Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
services/api-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; mixing them results in dependency conflicts and runtime failures.

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove MongoDB starter dependency as it is no longer used in this service.
Remove OpenFeign starter dependency as it is no longer used.
Remove old SpringDoc OpenAPI UI dependency (v1.x) which is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.
services/api-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: springdoc-openapi-ui 1.x relies on javax.servlet and Swagger 2, which are removed/incompatible in Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE).

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Security starter dependency as it is no longer used.
Add Redis data starter dependency to replace MongoDB or add caching capabilities.
Add gRPC client Spring Boot starter dependency.
Add javax.annotation-api dependency to provide annotations removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+.
services/api-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Classes like @Generated or @Nullable from javax.annotation are no longer on the classpath by default in Java 11+, causing NoClassDefFoundError if used by libraries.

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jackson datatype protobuf dependency for serialization support.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI Starter WebMVC UI dependency (v2.x) compatible with Spring Boot 3.
services/api-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: The v1.x artifact is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE); v2.x is required for API documentation generation.

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Add OS Maven plugin extension to detect OS for native protoc compiler download.
Add Protobuf Maven plugin to compile .proto files during build.
Remove spring-boot.version property as it is managed by the parent POM.
Remove spring-boot-starter-test dependency explicitly defined in dependencies block, likely relying on parent or other management.

services/api-gateway/src/main/java/com/e.general_idea: Replace deprecated Eureka-specific annotation with the generic Spring Cloud Discovery Client annotation.
services/api-gateway/src/main/java/com/e.why_exists: The class org.springframework.cloud.netflix.eureka.EnableEurekaClient is removed or deprecated in newer Spring Cloud versions compatible with JDK 21, causing a compile error if the import and annotation are retained.

services/api-gateway/src/main/java/com/e.general_idea: Remove explicit Feign client enablement annotation in favor of auto-configuration or different setup.
Remove explicit MongoDB auditing enablement annotation.
Remove explicit transaction management enablement annotation.
Add a Bean definition for ProtobufModule to support Protocol Buffers serialization.

services/api-gateway/src/main/resources/.general_idea: Remove MongoDB configuration properties as the data store dependency is being removed.
Remove HTTP service URL configurations for merchant, search, user, cart, and order services.
Add gRPC client configuration for the order service using service discovery.
Add gRPC client configuration for the catalog service using service discovery.
Add gRPC client configuration for the search service using service discovery.
Remove Resilience4j circuit breaker configuration for the merchant service.
Remove Resilience4j circuit breaker configuration for the search service.

services/order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.18 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
services/order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

services/order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
services/order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 11 settings on JDK 21 may cause compatibility issues or fail to utilize new features; required for JDK 21 baseline.

services/order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.8 to 2023.0.3 to match Spring Boot 3.x.
services/order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; upgrade required for compatibility.

services/order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit spring-boot.version property as it is managed by the parent POM.
Add lombok.version property to manage Lombok version explicitly.
Replace MongoDB starter with Web starter, reflecting a shift in data persistence strategy.
Replace Web starter with JPA starter, indicating a move to relational database persistence.
Replace OpenFeign starter with PostgreSQL driver, removing service-to-service HTTP client in favor of direct DB access.
Remove springdoc-openapi-ui dependency, likely replacing it with SpringDoc 2.x or removing API docs.
Add Spring Kafka dependency for message brokering capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Data Redis starter for caching or session management.
Explicitly set Lombok version to 1.18.32 in the dependency declaration.
Add gRPC server starter for Spring Boot to enable gRPC services.
Add gRPC stub dependency for client-side gRPC communication.
Add gRPC protobuf dependency for protocol buffer support in gRPC.
Add javax.annotation-api to provide annotations removed from JDK 11+ (e.g., @Generated).
services/order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Code using javax.annotation.Generated or similar will fail to compile without this dependency on JDK 11+.

services/order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add os-maven-plugin extension to detect OS for native dependencies (like protoc).
Add protobuf-maven-plugin to compile .proto files into Java classes.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use source/target 21 and configure Lombok annotation processor.
services/order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Required to compile code with Java 21 features and ensure Lombok processes annotations correctly.

services/order-service/src/main/java/com.general_idea: Rename package from com.example.Orders to com.example.orders to follow Java naming conventions.
Replace deprecated Eureka-specific annotation with generic discovery client annotation.
Remove explicit Feign client enablement annotation, likely relying on auto-configuration or alternative setup.

services/search-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.18 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
services/search-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

services/search-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
services/search-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with source/target 11 on JDK 21 may produce warnings or fail if strict compliance is enforced; explicit 21 target is required for modern features.

services/search-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud version from 2021.0.8 to 2023.0.3 to match Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
services/search-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; using it would cause dependency resolution conflicts or runtime failures.

services/search-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove redundant spring-boot.version property as it is now managed by the parent POM.
Replace Solr client dependency with Spring Data Elasticsearch starter.
Add Spring Kafka dependency for message brokering support.
Add Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka Client for service discovery.
Add gRPC server starter for Spring Boot to enable gRPC services.
Add gRPC stub dependency for client-side gRPC calls.
Add gRPC protobuf dependency for protocol buffer support.
Replace Springfox Swagger dependencies with javax.annotation-api, likely migrating to SpringDoc or manual annotation handling.
services/search-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is not compatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE namespace changes); removal is required to avoid compile/runtime errors.

services/search-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add OS Maven plugin extension to detect operating system for native tool downloads.
Add Protobuf Maven plugin to compile .proto files into Java classes.

services/search-service/src/main/java/co.general_idea: Rename the package from com.example.Search to com.example.search to follow Java naming conventions.
Add Spring Cloud Discovery Client support by importing and annotating the main application class.
